_comment: TAKEHARA VICTORY WATCHER — plays from the Java win-hook after the Takehara gym battle (hook already wired to `takehara_victory_watcher`). ABSOLUTE keyframes: the camera opens low in the fight pit (~2058/140/2465 eye), then RISES and TILTS UP the open-top shaft to reveal an all-black figure standing OUTSIDE the glass at 2065.5/177/2481.5, looking down at the arena. The figure is spawned for the scene via doublePreset (watcher_shadow_dark) at doublePos and auto-swept afterward (cutscene-only clone, Tag ci_cutscene_double). Rule 7: never named — an ominous subtitle only. KEYFRAME-Y = camera EYE height minus 1.78 (docs/ENGINE_FINDINGS.md): floor-1 arena floor is y138, the figure eye ~y177 outside the glass at the open top. YAW toward the figure from the pit (dx +5.5 / dz +11.5 => yaw ~ -26); PITCH starts negative (looking UP at the high figure) and eases toward level as the camera climbs to the figure's height. FIRST-PASS GEOMETRY — the Takehara arena did not load for offline probing: air-verify the eye path (open-top shaft x2065 z2481, floor 2055.5/138/2460.5, perch y173) + the sight line to the figure in-world and nudge, or re-record with /cutscene record. RETUNE 2026-07-22 (playtest: 'it doesn't fly up, just moves x/z'): flattened the horizontal drift (x +4.5->+1.5, z +12->+7) so Y (+36) overwhelmingly dominates the translation, and held the up-look (pitch -40 -> -4) so the climb REVEALS the figure instead of drifting toward it — the vertical read was getting lost. Engine + data were already correct (cy IS lerped/applied; verified), so if it STILL reads flat in-world the ascent column (x2060/z2472) is rising through solid structure beside the open shaft (x2065/z2481) — re-record up the actual open column. No endBack/endCommand: the fight is already won, the scene just restores the player in place.
